title: Ich zähle täglich meine Sorgen
overview: For business reasons, Rosemary is supposed to marry Peter, a stranger to her, according to her father's wishes. However, while fleeing from America back to Europe, Rosemary and Peter meet under assumed names and fall in love.

trailers.title: Ich zähle täglich meine Sorgen Peter Alexander (Film-Titel-Song)
